g.text: Next.js 15 + React 19 · TypeScript · Tailwind · shadcn/ui · PWA
FastAPI · REST + GraphQL (Strawberry) · Supabase Auth (JWT/OAuth2) · CORS · Rate limiting
Layer 3 — Core backend services (FastAPI · Python 3.12 · Railway)
Layer 7 — notification channels (Celery workers · Redis broker)
Docker · docker-compose · GitHub Actions CI/CD · Vercel · Railway · Sentry · PostHog

svg.text: LLM: Ollama (Llama 3.2 / Mistral 7B) as primary — fully local, no API cost. HF fine-tuned nutrition model for domain accuracy. Claude API as circuit-breaker fallback.
DB split: PostgreSQL (Supabase) for auth + user data (RLS enforced). MongoDB for meal plans + logs (flexible schema). Redis for cache + Celery job queue.
LangChain: NutritionChain (RAG over food DB + inference engine tool) → structured meal plan → USDA/IFCT nutrient enrichment → guard-rail validation.
MLOps: MLflow tracks fine-tuning runs. DVC versions IFCT/ICMR datasets. BentoML serves models. Prometheus + Grafana monitors latency + nutrient accuracy drift.
Notifications: Celery workers trigger daily meal reminders (WhatsApp preferred in India), weekly nutrient gap reports (email), GLP-1 dose reminders (push + SMS).
Data: IFCT 2017 Indian food DB (88 foods, 27 nutrients, 7 regions), ICMR-NIN RDA tables, GLP-1 protocols, disease nutrition protocols — all from your project files.
